items.title: Jensen Huang says Nvidia's recent $30B investment in OpenAI "might be the last time" it invests in the company, because OpenAI is "going to go public" (Ashley Capoot/CNBC)
items.title_en: Jensen Huang says Nvidia's recent $30B investment in OpenAI "might be the last time" it invests in the company, because OpenAI is "going to go public" (Ashley Capoot/CNBC)
items.title_zh: Jensen Huang 表示 Nvidia 最近对 OpenAI 的 300 亿美元投资“可能是最后一次”投资该公司，因为 OpenAI “即将上市”（Ashley Capoot/CNBC）
